creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Marco Beishuizen from comment #1)
Confirm. I did "portmaster poppler" and then tried to just reinstall tex-luatex with no change. Noyt a surprise, but quick to try. Then rebuilt tex-luatex from scratch and it installed fine. Since I updated all poppler ports except poppler-data yesterday, I guess that one needed the re-install.

POER_REVISION bump?
